name: Weaver’s Hall
M: w w w w w   w w w w w
w j[    w   d⍴    w w
w       w M¨w w   w w
w   w w w   w w w   w
w w w       w   w   w
w w w w   w w w w w w

j[.task: {j[} is the _diamond of selection_ — a pair of brackets `[ ]` set to the right of a list, naming by position which items to draw from it. From the woven word `w`, draw the strands at the places `p`, in that order.

d⍴.task: {d⍴} is the _ruby rune of reshaping_, laying the strand on its right into a cloth of the rows and columns named on its left. Weave the thread `t` into a panel of shape `s` — so many rows, so many columns.

M¨.task: {M¨} is the _sapphire rune of everywhere_ — set to the right of a rune, it works that rune upon each item on its right in turn. Drawing on {m⌽}, mirror every strand of the skein `s`, each end for end.

aM.task:
The looms of Weaver's Hall run every thread in reverse. _Transform_ the skein `s` — a bundle of separate threads — by mirroring _each_ thread end-for-end. Draw on {m⌽} within {M¨}.

`{answer}` upon `'MOOD' 'NET' 'POP'` gives `'DOOM' 'TEN' 'POP'`.
